name: Date Orange Cookie Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup DOLE Almonds, toasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat margarine and sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in flour until blended.
3. Beat in orange juice and grated DOLE Orange peel, then dates and almonds.
4. Form the dough into a ball.
5. Place on a greased 14-inch pizza pan.
6. Pat to 12 inches in diameter.
7. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
8. Cool completely.
9. Cut into 14-16 wedges to serve.
Makes 14-16 servings.
